nodes.summary: Repository instructions and context for AI coding agents.
Project overview and entry point for new readers.
Config module metrics defining make_metric, MCPMetricPresets, web_search.
Service module batch_runner defining BatchJob, __post_init__, BatchReport.
Service module caf_state defining infer_phase, score_evidence_confidence, CAFConfigTarget.
Service module comparison defining ComparisonConfig, ComparisonResult, build_metric_table.
Service module environment defining BaseEnvironment, execute, read_file.
Service module judge defining JudgeScore, GroundTruthCase, FrontierJudge.
Service module llama_server defining is_running, get_server_info, get_n_ctx.
Service module logsetup defining configure_logging, _level_for, logged_on_log.
Service module mcp_manager defining poll_mcp_process, start_mcp, stop_mcp.
Service module models defining _is_inference_model, scan_gguf_models, fetch_ollama_models.
Service module preflight defining TestResult, icon, build_config_from_state.
Service module schema_registry defining SchemaRegistry, generate_metrics_from_schema, parse_schema_from_json.
Service module session_log defining SessionLog, __init__, session_dir.
Service module settings_store defining _sanitize_projects, save_settings, load_settings.
Service module state defining init_state, sync_scenario, _clear_dynamic_widget_keys.
Service module utils defining ensure_http_scheme, strip_ansi.
Application module gui_dashboard defining NmapAnalyticsGUI, __init__, trigger_scan.
Application module index defining registerHandlers, createServer, isInitializeRequest.
Application module mcp_nmap_server defining scan_local_machine_wrapper, file_creator_wrapper.
Node package manifest: dependencies, scripts, and metadata.
Application module tools defining scan_local_machine, file_creator, cancel_scan.
Python project metadata, dependencies, and build configuration.
UI module components defining badge, type_badge, status_pill.
UI module judge_config defining _get_judge, render, render_judge_results.

layers.name: Dashboard Interface Components
layers.description: Provides the visual layout, interactive tabs, and styling definitions for the application's user interface.

layers.name: System Entry Points
layers.description: Contains the primary execution scripts, project documentation, and interface definitions for external tool integration.

layers.name: Environment Validation Tool
layers.description: Executes pre-runtime verification checks to ensure the system environment is correctly configured.

layers.name: Core Evaluation Engine
layers.description: Manages the primary business logic, state tracking, and execution environment for the evaluation framework.

layers.name: System Configuration Definitions
layers.description: Stores operational parameters, scenario templates, and environment-specific settings used to drive system behavior.

layers.name: Quality Assurance Suite
layers.description: A comprehensive collection of unit, functional, and smoke tests designed to validate system state, integration points, and core application workflows.
